inline_comments.message:
[Question] This version is use somewhere?

Becouse we hardcode url in: https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/oom/offline-installer/+/121596/2/build/data_lists/kube_prometheus_stack_http.list

$ git grep kube_prometheus_stack_version
ansible/group_vars/infrastructure.yml:kube_prometheus_stack_version: 16.1.2
ansible/roles/kube-prometheus-stack/tasks/main.yml:    path: "{{ app_data_path }}/downloads/kube-prometheus-stack-{{ kube_prometheus_stack_version }}.tgz"
ansible/roles/kube-prometheus-stack/tasks/main.yml:    chart_ref: "{{ app_data_path }}/downloads/kube-prometheus-stack-{{ kube_prometheus_stack_version }}.tgz"
ansible/test/roles/prepare-kube-prometheus-stack/tasks/main.yml:- name: "Download kube-prometheus-stack-{{ kube_prometheus_stack_version }}.tgz"
ansible/test/roles/prepare-kube-prometheus-stack/tasks/main.yml:    url: "https://github.com/prometheus-community/helm-charts/releases/download/kube-prometheus-stack-{{ kube_prometheus_stack_version }}/kube-prometheus-stack-{{ kube_prometheus_stack_version }}.tgz"

Build scripts and ansible do not share the config so version string has to be embedded in data lists like it is.
